entities.name: Founder Mental Load
entities.context: The psychological and emotional burden founders carry, central to startup survival

entities.name: Emotional Resilience
entities.context: Capacity to handle layoffs, repeated sales rejection, and ambiguous hiring calls

entities.name: Coaches
entities.context: External advisors relied upon by founders to maintain effectiveness under stress

entities.name: Peer Communities
entities.context: Networks of fellow founders/professionals used for support and staying effective

entities.name: Layoffs
entities.context: Workforce reductions that create significant emotional burden for founders

entities.name: Sales Rejection
entities.context: Repeated rejection in sales processes contributing to founder mental load

entities.name: Ambiguous Hiring Calls
entities.context: Unclear or difficult hiring decisions that add to founder emotional burden

relationships.context: Emotional resilience is the core capability needed to manage founder mental load
Founders rely on coaches to cope with mental load and stay effective
Founders rely on peer communities to cope with mental load and stay effective
Handling layoffs is a key contributor to founder mental load
Repeated sales rejection is a key contributor to founder mental load
Ambiguous hiring decisions are a key contributor to founder mental load
